final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing UI design system for a tech dashboard and mobile interface kit.

Style/medium: classic minimalist tech aesthetic, clean vector UI components, Apple Human Interface Guidelines meets Material Design 3, subtle glassmorphism accents
Subject: comprehensive UI kit including dashboard layouts, mobile screens, data cards, primary/secondary buttons, form controls, toggle switches, sliders, input fields, navigation tabs
Composition: organized component grid showing multiple states (default, hover, active, disabled), consistent 8px spacing system, responsive breakpoints demonstration
Color palette: deep navy or charcoal as primary background, electric blue or cyan as accent, pure white for text and surfaces, subtle gray scale for hierarchy
Materials/textures: matte surface finish with soft shadows, subtle blur effects for overlays, crisp 1px borders, smooth rounded corners (8-16px radius)
Lighting/mood: subtle ambient glow on interactive elements, soft drop shadows creating depth without heaviness, focused and professional atmosphere
Constraints: all components must maintain visual consistency across web and mobile; touch targets minimum 44x44pt; scalable to dark/light mode variants
Avoid: skeuomorphic textures like leather or wood; excessive gradients; drop shadows that look like glow sticks; cluttered layouts; 3D extrusion effects; neon cyberpunk palette
